objections.claim: The candidate claims to implement the corpus-level consumer named by the frozen methodology while explicitly excluding Daedalus plans, findings, amendments, dispositions, tests, and authorization results as first-class lineage. The frozen target is review over the complete lineage. This may be delivered as a coverage preflight, but it cannot be represented as the corpus review or as covering all five detection targets until completeness is established.

A depth-2 blast radius over one committed graph snapshot cannot discriminate temporal behavioral widening or repair-induced causality. The candidate has no amendment-to-symbol lineage from which to compute “growth across amendments” or “amendment-touched symbols”; overlap is correlation, not a repair-induced finding. Counting those signals toward the two-findings redesign threshold would therefore produce unsupported methodology triggers. Truncated radius results also lack fail-closed classification semantics.

The candidate adds a new report harness, inputs, outputs, classifications, and exit behavior but omits the behavioral-delta accounting required for every amendment: behavior added/removed, states, transitions, input forms, trust boundaries, runtime obligations, negative tests, and net behavioral-surface change.
